details.test: Task 1: Shortlist 3 highly rated downtown restaurants for weekday lunch
Task 2: Register for cheapest next-month morning networking event under $40 with invoice
Task 3: Select membership plan under $350 with directory listing & event discounts using invoice
Task 4: Post a 30-day 'Part-Time Sales Associate' job in Sales & Business Development
Task 5: Save and open the most popular 'Starting a Business' guide for current year
Task 6: Submit $500 sponsorship inquiry for Annual Gala with program recognition only
Task 7: Save two member-only deals (>=20% discount, expiring after Oct 31, 2026) and reveal codes
Task 8: Contact nearest 4+ star minority-owned IT services business within 10 miles
Task 9: Subscribe to weekly newsletter for 'Small Business Resources' and 'Upcoming Events' only
